wifi.title: Wi-Fi
wifi.footer: If you have connection issues — message the host.

stove.title: Induction cooktop
stove.text: Turn on the cooktop with the power button. Place cookware on a burner. Adjust power with the +/− buttons.

extend.title: Extend your stay
extend.description: To extend your stay, please contact the host.
extend.footer: Call if it's urgent and the host doesn't reply on Telegram.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Host's Telegram
support.footer: If it's truly urgent — please call.

rules.title: House rules
rules.intro: These house rules exist to keep the stay comfortable, safe and predictable for everyone. Please be respectful of the space, the neighbours and the calm atmosphere.
list: Smoking inside the studio is not allowed
Sharing access, keys or codes with third parties is not allowed
Short visits from guests are allowed if house rules are followed and neighbours are respected
Guests must not cause discomfort to neighbours
Complaints from neighbours about noise or behaviour are treated as a rules violation
Heavy soiling of the studio is treated as a rules violation
The guest is responsible for any confirmed damage to studio property
Damage is documented by the host during the unit inspection
For a first minor violation a warning may be issued without withholding the deposit
For a serious violation, the deposit may be withheld in full
The decision to withhold the deposit is made by the host
When needed, the situation is discussed with the guest in advance
rules.outro: Thank you for respecting the space.

deposit.title: Security deposit
deposit.intro: On check-in, a security deposit of {amount} {currency} is required. The deposit is paid after the unit inspection and confirmed check-in. Payment is processed via the Telegram bot to the bank account.
rules: For a rules violation, the host may withhold part or all of the deposit
For a first minor violation a warning may be issued without withholding the deposit
The decision to withhold the deposit is made by the host
When needed, the situation is discussed with the guest in advance
return: After check-out, the studio is inspected and the final electricity bill is settled
The deposit is returned after the unit inspection and electricity payment
Usually the refund is processed within a few hours after check-out
Maximum refund time — 24 hours after check-out
Refunds are sent to the same account or payment method that was used to pay

checkout.title: Check-out
before: Send a photo of the meter via the Telegram bot
checkout.footer: Thank you for taking good care of the place.
